n: Instance: Laying to Rest the Evil Dead

steps.t: You should speak with Glorfindel before proceeding against the enemy. Glorfindel is standing outside Ost Brandras and waiting for your aid in confront…
Glorfindel is standing at the base of the altar in Ost Brandras. You have fought your way through many fell spirits and should now confront Ferndúr wh…
The gaunt-men can be found atop the altar in Ost Brandras. You have reached the base of the altar, and should now confront the gaunt-men.
